_comment: ThinkPad Utility Management — Genuine battery manufacturer lookup table.
_usage: Add entries to genuineManufacturers to extend detection without editing the script.
_matching: The 'name' field is matched case-insensitively against BatteryStaticData.ManufactureName via a substring match.

genuineManufacturers.name: PANASONIC
genuineManufacturers.notes: Historic OEM supplier — IBM and early Lenovo ThinkPad era

genuineManufacturers.name: SANYO
genuineManufacturers.notes: Historic OEM supplier — acquired by Panasonic in 2009

genuineManufacturers.name: SONY
genuineManufacturers.notes: Historic OEM supplier — battery division sold to Murata in 2017

genuineManufacturers.name: MURATA
genuineManufacturers.notes: Acquired Sony Energy Devices battery division in 2017

genuineManufacturers.name: LGC
genuineManufacturers.notes: Common modern OEM supplier — primary string reported by firmware

genuineManufacturers.name: LG
genuineManufacturers.notes: Alternate short form of LGC reported by some ThinkPad firmware versions

genuineManufacturers.name: SDI
genuineManufacturers.notes: Samsung SDI battery division — primary string reported by firmware

genuineManufacturers.name: SAMSUNG
genuineManufacturers.notes: Alternate form of SDI reported by some ThinkPad firmware versions

genuineManufacturers.name: CELXPERT
genuineManufacturers.notes: Confirmed Lenovo-authorized supplier — common in ThinkPad T and X series

genuineManufacturers.name: SUNWODA
genuineManufacturers.notes: Confirmed Lenovo-authorized supplier — common in ThinkPad E series
